CREATE TABLE hosts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, domain_name VARCHAR(255), ip_address VARCHAR(15));
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyname(domain_name) AS resolved_ip FROM hosts WHERE domain_name = 'example.com';
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyname(domain_name) AS resolved_ip FROM hosts WHERE domain_name IN (SELECT domain_name FROM hosts WHERE ip_address IS NOT NULL);
SELECT h1.domain_name, tcpip_gethostbyname(h1.domain_name) AS resolved_ip FROM hosts h1 JOIN hosts h2 ON h1.id = h2.id WHERE h2.ip_address IS NOT NULL;
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyname('nonexistentdomain.test') AS resolved_ip WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hosts WHERE domain_name = 'nonexistentdomain.test');
SELECT domain_name, tcpip_gethostbyname(domain_name) AS resolved_ip FROM hosts ORDER BY domain_name LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0;
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyname(h.domain_name) FROM (SELECT domain_name FROM hosts LIMIT 5) AS h;
